testcase.name: test_classes_start_returns_zoom_fields

skipped.message: Zoom API call failed (likely invalid creds in env): Failed to create video meeting: Failed to create Zoom meeting: {"code":4711,"message":"Invalid access token, does not contain scopes:[meeting:write:meeting, meeting:write:meeting:admin]."}
